skills.name: Ticket Management
skills.description: Create, track, and manage support tickets across all channels with automatic status transitions

skills.name: Knowledge Base Search
skills.description: Semantic search of product documentation and resolved Q&A pairs using pgvector embeddings

skills.name: Sentiment Analysis
skills.description: Real-time sentiment scoring (0.0-1.0) on every inbound message using gpt-4o-mini

skills.name: Escalation Handling
skills.description: Detect guardrail triggers and escalate to human agents with full context

skills.name: Channel-Aware Response
skills.description: Send responses formatted for Gmail (formal), WhatsApp (conversational), or Web Form (semi-formal)

skills.name: Daily Report Generation
skills.description: Generate daily sentiment and metrics reports with per-channel breakdown

skills.name: Cross-Channel Continuity
skills.description: Retrieve and maintain customer conversation history across Gmail, WhatsApp, and Web Form
